$metadata.description: User Insights Dashboard — Triage Board: action-first view for items that need a response now

brainstorm.userJob: When I open the insights dashboard, I want to immediately see what needs my attention so I can respond to critical user issues before they escalate.
brainstorm.thesis: PMs don't open this to admire graphs — they come to decide what needs a response NOW.

textContent.value: 2 negative feedback spikes detected in Checkout flow
The checkout flow is completely broken on mobile. I tried 3 times and couldn't complete my purchase.
NPS score dropped from 8 to 2 after latest update. Search is unusably slow now.
Cannot upload files larger than 5MB. This is blocking our entire team from using the product.
Dark mode text is nearly invisible on several screens. Had to switch back to light mode.
Pricing page is confusing — can't tell the difference between Pro and Enterprise tiers.

overrides.message: 2 negative feedback spikes detected in Checkout flow
